Title: Relates to the protection of people with special needs and the confidentiality of certain documents
Summary: Relates to confidentiality in cases involving the protection of people with special needs; allows the state comptroller's office to unseal certain documents.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the social services law, in relation to authorizing certain reports relating to reportable incidents involving vulnerable persons to be made available to officers and employees of the state comptroller for the purposes of a duly authorized performance audit
